provisions.title: Short title and commencement
provisions.content: This Act may be cited as the Entertainment Tax (Repeal) Act, and shall come into operation on the 27th January, 1996.

provisions.title: Repeal of Cap. 661 of the old edition
provisions.content: The Entertainment Tax Act is hereby repealed.
